creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed

First of all, thanks for the translation, my mail client didn't even 
notice that there was a 'odd' language in the ticket (anything not 
english classifies as odd for this matter). The translation clearly 
indicates that this is a userland question, please proceed to 
http://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo and ask the question to the 
appropriate mailinglist, most likely the Questions list 
(Freebsd-questions). Thanks for the willingness to improve FreeBSD!
